name: 高令宁卧房
era_style: 明代晚期官宦府邸卧房
description: 温馨实用的已婚卧房，绣花针箍与虎头帽绣线散落于桌案，中央绣床靠窗，门框处有靠姿痕迹。家具简洁舒适，空间带孕期生活气息。
visual_reference: Cozy married bedroom in late Ming dynasty official mansion, embroidery hoop and tiger-head hat threads on table, carved wooden bed by window, doorframe leaning pose area, practical Ming furniture with subtle pregnancy details, soft daylight interior, highly detailed
lighting: 白天柔和自然光线，温暖宁静
emotional_range: 沈词抱许和离的潋滟一笑到女主躲吻
